meaning: vt.指弹,敲打,加缨于vi.乱弹,轻敲n.织边,织余,线头,纱头
examples: My head was going thrum thrum thrum.
And mooring cables would thrum in the currents, like a guitar string.
The clop of their hooves sounds oddly bucolic against the throaty thrum of helicopters overhead.
Nearly 20 million people live here and the thrum of human noise is constant.
As I absorbed these words, the thrum of Cairo beat in my ears.
